tool.name: EnzyWizard Batch
tool.description: Run a complete EnzyWizard analysis workflow
tool.command: ln -s '$input_path' input.cif && ln -s '$input_msa' input_msa.sto && enzywizard-batch -i input.cif -m input_msa.sto #if $substrate_names: -s '$substrate_names' #end if --hydrocluster_cutoff '$hydrocluster_cutoff' $no_minimize_energy --energy_minimization_iteration '$minimization_iteration' --flexibility_method '$flexibility_method' --flexibility_cutoff '$flexibility_cutoff' --flexibility_n_modes '$flexibility_n_modes' --disorder_window_size '$disorder_window_size' --disorder_min_region_length '$disorder_min_region_length' --embedding_model_name '$embedding_model_name' -o ./
tool.help: Run a complete EnzyWizard analysis workflow. The wrapper symlinks Galaxy file inputs into the job working directory and captures the tool-created output directory/files as a Galaxy discovered collection.
